data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. PRINCE LAROI is a consistent runner who is having his first look at course. Lines up here in winning form after scoring by 3.5 lengths from box seven at Geelong (22.78). Shapes as a top winning chance on latest effort. 3. LITTLE MASTER was strongly fancied latest and proved too good with a neck win at this track in a handy 16.86. Fair draw can see a good run and has the ability and in winning form. Deserves serious consideration again. 1. TARYN'S BLUE finished well back at this track last time when a 3 length fifth (17.07) but scored four back at this track (16.79). Solid record here at the distance winning 13 races. Bold showing expected. 4. BUSH PROFIT is a last start winner in very good time. Right in the mix.","runners":[8,3,1,4],"exclusive":false}
